_comment: Starting point for hyperparameter search. Balanced settings — tune lr, batch, base-filters.

_tuning_guide.lr: Try: 1e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 3e-3. Lower lr + more epochs generally better.
_tuning_guide.batch: Try: 4, 8, 16. Larger batch = more stable gradients but needs more VRAM.
_tuning_guide.base-filters: Try: 16, 32, 64. More filters = more capacity but slower + more memory.
_tuning_guide.depth: Try: 2, 3, 4. Deeper = larger receptive field, more risk of overfitting.
_tuning_guide.d-frames: Try: 2, 4, 8. Higher = more 3D context but more memory. Match to VRAM.
_tuning_guide.image-size: Try: 64, 96, 128. Higher = more spatial detail but slower.
